text: This is the VOA Special English Agriculture Report.
zh: [0] 这里是美国之音特别英语农业报道。

text: Pigweed is a weed that spreads fast and grows up to two meters tall.
zh: [1] 猪草是一种蔓延迅速、能长到两米高的杂草。

text: It can overpower cotton and other crops.
zh: [2] 它能压制棉花及其他农作物的生长。

text: It comes from the amaranth family and is also known as Palmer amaranth or Palmer's pigweed.
zh: [3] 它属于苋科植物,也被称为帕默苋或帕默猪草。

text: A cultivated version of amaranth is grown for food and medicine in Africa and Asia.
zh: [4] 在非洲和亚洲,人们种植栽培型苋菜作为食物和药材。

text: In the United States, some people buy amaranth as a gluten -free substitute for wheat flour.
zh: [5] 在美国,一些人购买苋菜作为无麸质的小麦粉替代品。

text: But wild pigweed is a big problem in cotton -growing states in the South.
zh: [6] 但野生猪草在南方各产棉州是个大问题。

text: And now the plant is spreading into the Midwest.
zh: [7] 而如今这种植物正蔓延到中西部地区。

text: West. In many cases, the pigweed is killing
zh: [8] 在许多情况下,猪草正在扼杀

text: genetically modified cotton and soybeans.
zh: [9] 转基因棉花和大豆。

text: For years, farmers could control it by spraying with Roundup or glyphosate made by Monsanto.
zh: [10] 多年来,农民可以通过喷洒孟山都公司生产的“农达”(即草甘膦)来控制它。

text: But weed scientist William Curran at Pennsylvania State University says over the past three or four For
zh: [11] 但宾夕法尼亚州立大学杂草科学家威廉·柯伦说,在过去三四年里,

text: years, pigweed has become resistant to glyphosate. Now, farmers in some areas
zh: [12] 猪草已经对草甘膦产生了抗药性。如今在一些地区,农民

text: can no longer depend on that popular herbicide alone to defend against pigweed.
zh: [13] 已无法再单靠这种常用除草剂来防治猪草。

text: He says farmers can try other herbicides, or they can mix another herbicide with Roundup
zh: [14] 他说,农民可以尝试其他除草剂,或者将另一种除草剂与农达混合使用,

text: and use the mixture when they would normally spray their fields.
zh: [15] 在通常喷洒农田的时候使用这种混合剂。

text: The reality is even though we have this weed, this one weed that is resistant,
zh: [16] 事实是,尽管我们有这种具有抗药性的杂草,

text: there's still a lot of other weeds that Roundup still kills.
zh: [17] 农达仍然能够杀死其他许多种类的杂草。

text: Farmers in the American northeast face a growing threat from another weed.
zh: [18] 美国东北部的农民正面临另一种杂草日益严重的威胁。

text: Scientists call it horse weed.
zh: [19] 科学家称之为加拿大蓬。

text: Farmers call it mare's tail. pale.
zh: [20] 农民则称它为“马尾草”。

text: Like pigweed, this plant has also developed the ability to resist glyphosate.
zh: [21] 与猪草一样,这种植物也已产生了对草甘膦的抗药性。

text: Professor Curran sees one major reason for
zh: [22] 柯伦教授认为,造成这种现象的一个主要原因是

text: this. Farmers are depending too much on individual products
zh: [23] 农民过于依赖单一产品,

text: and not enough on different strategies to manage weeds. The question, he says,
zh: [24] 而没有足够重视采用不同策略来管理杂草。他说,问题在于

text: is how how best to use a system of integrated pest management to control weeds.
zh: [25] 如何最好地运用综合虫害管理体系来防治杂草。

text: For example, IPM calls for farmers to rotate their crops
zh: [26] 例如,综合虫害管理提倡农民轮作作物,

text: instead of planting the same ones in the same soil year after year.
zh: [27] 而不是年复一年在同一块地里种植相同的作物。

text: Professor Curran says farmers should also consider planting cover crops.
zh: [28] 柯伦教授说,农民还应考虑种植覆盖作物。

text: These crops are grown temporarily to protect the soil.
zh: [29] 这些作物是暂时种植的,用以保护土壤。

text: For instance, planting rye in the fall can suppress horseweed.
zh: [30] 比如,秋季种植黑麦可以抑制加拿大蓬的生长。

text: If you have winter rye out there occupying that space,
zh: [31] 如果地里种着越冬黑麦,占据了那片空间,

text: it's very competitive and the horseweed is less successful in establishing.
zh: [32] 它的竞争力很强,加拿大蓬就更难扎根生长。

text: In the next two or three years, several companies expect to have new herbicides
zh: [33] 在接下来的两三年里,几家公司预计将推出新型除草剂,

text: along with crops that can survive spraying with those chemicals.
zh: [34] 以及能够耐受这些化学药剂喷洒的农作物。

text: And that's the VOA Special English Agriculture Report.
zh: [35] 以上就是美国之音特别英语农业报道。

text: If you have a farm, tell us how you manage weeds.
zh: [36] 如果您有农场,欢迎告诉我们您是如何管理杂草的。

text: Share your comments at voaspecialenglish .com.
zh: [37] 请到voaspecialenglish.com分享您的看法。

text: For VOA Special English, I'm Carolyn Prosutti.
zh: [38] 我是卡罗琳·普罗苏蒂,这里是美国之音特别英语节目。
